etymology_and_history.root_language: Language**: From "out" + "going" from Old English "ut" + "gān" (going out)
etymology_and_history.original_meaning: Meaning**: Going out; having sociable extroverted and outgoing sociable with extroverted presence
etymology_and_history.semantic_evolution: Evolution**: Going out → sociable extroverted → contemporary outgoing sociable and outgoing extroverted with sociable presence
etymology_and_history.cultural_shifts: Shifts**: Going out → sociable extroverted → outgoing sociable → sociable understanding
